patch.value:
## Charter
Living capability epic for tracker self-governance: the checks and primitives that keep pm's own data trustworthy and machine-verifiable. Embodies the core philosophy — project management = context management — by guaranteeing an agent can rebuild full context from pm alone.

## Scope
- In: core/governance (content-fields, issue-codes, metadata-coverage), core/validate (fix-planning, estimate-defaults, missing-by-type, missing-link-owners, linked-artifact-reference, stale-file-classification), core/diagnostics/remediation registry, pm validate / pm health check surfaces, changelog governance (bucket-by-updated_at drag traps), and terminal-evidence backfill (resolution/close_reason).
- Out: source-code quality gates — CodeFactor/ESLint/jscpd/LOC/CC (pm-92if); CLI command ergonomics themselves (pm-mpbb); schema/type customization (pm-8jdc).

## Invariants this epic guards
- Every pm validate / pm health warning must map to exactly one open remediation item (the 'no orphan warning' rule).
- Audits are CREATE-ONLY on closed items: touching a closed item updates updated_at and drags it into the current [Unreleased] changelog bucket. Backfills run in a dedicated tracker-only pass with same-commit changelog review.
- No placeholder metadata: an honest empty beats fabricated 'done: done' resolution/close_reason evidence.
- issue-code dedupe is title-prefix based; metadata-coverage predicates are shared primitives (core/governance/metadata-coverage) reused by validate + stats + aggregate.

## Status
Continues the closed governance epics pm-5rjn (continuous governance automation) and pm-wtsp (governance + docs overhaul); builds on pm-yq7m (coverage observability), pm-hm1q (metadata-coverage primitive), pm-6bz1 (validate accuracy), pm-dw5s (low-signal checks), pm-cc04 (remediation-registry ADR), pm-sz6w (machine-executable remediation). Opens as a living backlog per the capability-epic convention — new governance/validation/data-quality work lands here.

## Open children (2026-07-04)
- pm-e9zh — backfill terminal resolution + close_reason evidence without placeholders or changelog drag (validate: 268 resolution + 18 close_reason).
- pm-j8z6 — reconcile linked-file ownership after source/test relocations (validate files: 146 missing + 134 orphaned paths).
- pm-pivf — resolve duplicate issue-code GH-209 warning without changelog drag.

pm validate/health warnings each map to an open remediation item; metadata-coverage predicates + issue-code + content-field governance stay accurate (no false positives, no missed real gaps); remediation registry keeps every finding machine-executable.
Keep the tracker itself trustworthy: metadata coverage, validation accuracy, remediation hints, and drift-free item/data quality
An agent can rebuild full context from pm alone because every item's metadata is complete, honest, and machine-checkable

author: codex-agent

patch.value: Living capability epic for governance, validation, lifecycle policy, metadata quality, dependency integrity, close-readiness rules, and data-quality repair workflows across the pm ecosystem.

message: Backfill description during all-status ecosystem audit
